Breakdown.Goal: Привести поведение бота в соответствие с user-facing текстами /start и /manual: собрать недостающие фичи, которые вредят (молчаливо игнорируемые команды), и переформулировать доки для фич, которые сознательно не строим. Закрывает 6 расхождений аудита 2026-06-13.

RunState.note: LIVE RUN — epic aisw-8l5, branch feat/service-repair. Chunks: aisw-htz, aisw-864, aisw-578, aisw-5wr.

Chunk.Title: Docs honesty — reword OCR / WIKI-create flow / drop WIKI-linked reminder (#1, #6, #4)
Chunk.Verification: grep -i "OCR" templates/ -> 0 hits; grep "за день до поездки" templates/ -> 0 hits; grep "1–3 уточняющих" templates/ -> 0 hits; uv run python scripts/lint_templates.py exit 0; make total-test exit 0.

Chunk.Title: Expose /cron_add in the Telegram command menu + /help (#5)
Chunk.Verification: unit asserts registered command list includes "cron_add" (7 commands); /help text mentions /cron_add; make total-test exit 0.

Chunk.Title: NL digest control — reschedule + disable via extended digest intent (#2)
Chunk.Inputs: prompts/classifier.md, src/ai_steward_wiki/classifier/schema.py, src/ai_steward_wiki/tg/pipeline.py, src/ai_steward_wiki/scheduler/firing.py, src/ai_steward_wiki/storage/jobs/, tests/unit/tg/, tests/unit/scheduler/
Chunk.Outputs: prompts/classifier.md, src/ai_steward_wiki/classifier/schema.py, src/ai_steward_wiki/tg/pipeline.py, src/ai_steward_wiki/scheduler/firing.py, tests/unit/scheduler/test_firing.py, tests/unit/tg/test_pipeline_digest.py, docs/superpowers/specs/20260613-service-repair/discovery-chunk3.md, design-chunk3.md, docs/superpowers/plans/20260613-service-repair/step-03-plan.md
Chunk.Verification: unit: «выключи ежедневную сводку»->action=disable; «переноси сводку на 7:30»->action=reschedule,time=07:30; reschedule updates trigger; disable flips job status; no-job path replies politely (Ru). make total-test exit 0.
Chunk.SplitNote: If post-Discovery estimate >60% window: split into 3.a (classifier action field + schema + prompt + unit) and 3.b (pipeline dispatch + firing reschedule/disable + tests).

Chunk.Title: «за N до» — second earlier reminder at T−N (#3)
Chunk.Outputs: prompts/classifier.md, src/ai_steward_wiki/storage/jobs/payloads.py, src/ai_steward_wiki/tg/pipeline.py, src/ai_steward_wiki/scheduler/firing.py, tests/unit/scheduler/test_firing.py, tests/unit/tg/test_pipeline_reminder.py, docs/superpowers/specs/20260613-service-repair/discovery-chunk4.md, design-chunk4.md, docs/superpowers/plans/20260613-service-repair/step-04-plan.md
Chunk.Verification: unit: «напомни в субботу в 12, а ещё за час до»->lead=60, two notifications scheduled (T and T−60min); «напомни завтра в 9 …» (no lead)->exactly one; make total-test exit 0.
Chunk.SplitNote: depends_on TBD-3: both edit prompts/classifier.md and tg/pipeline.py; serialized to avoid reassess churn.

Approval.reason: user-directive: always-auto-approve (dry-run: recorded only, no execution)

Decisions.Decision: #2 NL digest control — BUILD (chunk 3). User decision F1a.
#3 «за N до» / second reminder — BUILD (chunk 4). User decision F1b.
#6 WIKI-create «1–3 уточняющих вопроса» — REWORD docs to current single-confirm flow (chunk 1). User decision F1c.
#4 WIKI-linked relative reminder — DEFER (doc-soften only, chunk 1). Build via separate manual feature-workflow later. User decision F2.
#1 «OCR» wording — REWORD; vision stays, no OCR engine added (chunk 1). User decision F3.
#5 /cron_add — EXPOSE in set_my_commands + /help (chunk 2). User decision F4.
aisw-rui spec-frontmatter fix — OUT OF SCOPE for this epic. User decision F5.

Extend existing `digest` intent distilled_payload with action ∈ {create,reschedule,disable} (default create) rather than adding new top-level Intent enum members — keeps the 7-intent contract in prompts/classifier.md + classifier/schema.py:43 stable. Auto-applied (one-sided: schema stability vs new-enum churn).

Behavior fixed (two notifications: T and T−N). Mechanism (reuse existing ReminderPayload.lead_time_min at payloads.py:93 vs create a second reminder_job at T−N) chosen in chunk-4 Discovery depending on current lead_time_min semantics.
